name: preset-monument
description: Penumbra ADR 0011 — 'monument' preset. Cool-cream Qualia-parity background + soft lighting + mild edge soften. Locks environment + render + edgeSoften axis propagation through DisplayState.

setup.vlmDescription: An SDF teapot rendered in a soft, monument-style aesthetic: cool-cream background, gentle even lighting, slight glow halo from the bloom post pass. Reads like a design-mode render rather than a debug view.
